name: diag-simulation
description: Enable compute.simulation, ping a node, wait, capture. Verifies the runner causes edges to flash.

commands: (async () => { await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1000)); const fn = window.__qualiaSimulationPing; if (!fn) return { error: 'no ping function' }; const ok = fn('alice'); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 800)); return { pingOk: ok, hasHook: !!fn }; })()
